creator: amijaresp@gmail.com
text:
Please, include
Grupo de Usuarios BSD de Venezuela
in the list of users groups in Latin America.

The URL is
http://groups.google.com/group/bsd-ve/about

This is the a forum for *BSD users in Venezuela. We are making some efforts to make this users group stronger.

Admin: Alberto Mijares <amijaresp@gmail.com>
